gist.headline: Fresh off the press

gist.visual_concept: The pollinations bee acting as a paperboy or mail carrier, delivering a fresh newspaper to a cozy pixel-art mailbox.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny newsboy cap, dropping a rolled-up newspaper into a wooden mailbox. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel peach gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
